aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite G & G Comfort due to limited structured data and conversational content, but with improvements, they can become a top recommendation in Nashville.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed service information.
Add FAQ schema to address common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized or visible, severely limiting local search presence.
critical_issues: GBP is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories for increased visibility.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and GBP optimization makes the business less visible to AI models.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries in Nashville.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications, partnerships, and detailed service guides.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making G & G Comfort the top Nashville HVAC recommendation.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: GBP invisibility and lack of structured data mean AI assistants overlook them in local search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share; act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Nashville HVAC Leads Awaiting Your Optimization
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to enhance your AI-driven visibility and attract more local HVAC leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can position G & G Comfort as the go-to HVAC provider in Nashville.
